input: My name is Sarah Williams, SSN 456-78-9012. There's a massive pothole on Poplar Avenue near East High School that's been there for weeks.
I live at 123 Beale Street. The streetlight outside my window has been flickering for three days and it keeps my baby awake.
Someone dumped a couch and mattress on the corner of Lamar and Airways. It's been sitting there since Tuesday.
The water pressure at my house on Madison Avenue has been extremely low since yesterday morning.
What are the recycling pickup days for the Cooper-Young neighborhood?
